title: WHERE та ORDER BY
description: Фільтруй та сортуй дані за допомогою WHERE та ORDER BY.
starter_code:
import sqlite3

conn = sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
cur = conn.cursor()

cur.execute('CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, price REAL, category TEXT)')
for name, price, cat in [('Ноутбук', 25000, 'tech'), ('Мишка', 500, 'tech'), ('Стілець', 3000, 'furniture'), ('Стіл', 8000, 'furniture')]:
    cur.execute('INSERT INTO products (name, price, category) VALUES (?, ?, ?)', (name, price, cat))
conn.commit()

# WHERE
print('=== Техніка ===')
for row in cur.execute('SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE category = ?', ('tech',)):
    print(row)

# ORDER BY
print('\n=== Дорожчі спочатку ===')
for row in cur.execute('SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC'):
    print(row)
hints: WHERE col IN (v1, v2) — кілька значень

tests.input: import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect(':memory:'); c=conn.cursor(); c.execute('CREATE TABLE t(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, v INTEGER)'); [c.execute('INSERT INTO t(v) VALUES(?)',(i,)) for i in [3,1,2]]; conn.commit(); r=c.execute('SELECT v FROM t ORDER BY v').fetchall(); print(r)

explanation: WHERE фільтрує рядки, ORDER BY сортує результат.
